name: @borjie/meta-learning-conductor
description: Meta-learning conductor for Wave SELFIMPROVE. Orchestrates self-improvement loops: pulls capability-catalogue measurements through a structural port, curates training examples (redact + dedupe + reward-shape), evaluates before/after on held-out, decides promote/demote/no-op/rollback, and persists per-tenant audit-chained runs. Implements Docs/DESIGN/SELF_IMPROVE_AND_DP_FEDERATION_SPEC.md.
